_convention: KEYS ARE 0-BASED MIDI (data-list PC# minus 1), matching the raw PC byte inside .STY style files. To find an entry in the PDF, add 1 to the last number. Verified: Standard Kit 1 = 127-0-0 = data-list 127-0-1.
